bdo.util.net.ssl.compositejks

Class SSLContextUtils

  • java.lang.Object
    • bdo.util.net.ssl.compositejks.SSLContextUtils

  • public final class SSLContextUtils
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility methods for SSLContext.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String X509Algorithm
      The key manager algorithm to use for X509.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static javax.net.ssl.SSLContext buildMergedWithSystem(java.security.KeyStore keyStore)
      Generates an SSL context that uses a merged view of the system key store and a custom key store.
      static javax.net.ssl.X509KeyManager getSystemKeyManager(java.lang.String algorithm, java.security.KeyStore keystore, char[] password) 
      static javax.net.ssl.X509TrustManager getSystemTrustManager(java.lang.String algorithm, java.security.KeyStore keystore) 
      static void mergeWithSystem(java.io.File keyStoreFile, char[] passphrase)
      Configures the default SSL context to use a merged view of the system key store and a custom key store.
      static void mergeWithSystem(java.io.InputStream keyStoreStream, char[] passphrase)
      Configures the default SSL context to use a merged view of the system key store and a custom key store.
      static void mergeWithSystem(java.security.KeyStore keyStore)
      Configures the default SSL context to use a merged view of the system key store and a custom key store.

    • Field Detail

      • X509Algorithm

        public static java.lang.String X509Algorithm
        The key manager algorithm to use for X509. You may need to modify this if you are using a non-Oracle JDK.

    • Method Detail

      • mergeWithSystem

        public static void mergeWithSystem(java.security.KeyStore keyStore)
                            throws java.security.GeneralSecurityException
        Configures the default SSL context to use a merged view of the system key store and a custom key store.
        Parameters:
        keyStore - The custom key store.
        Throws:
        java.security.GeneralSecurityException

      • mergeWithSystem

        public static void mergeWithSystem(java.io.InputStream keyStoreStream,
                                   char[] passphrase)
                            throws java.security.GeneralSecurityException,
                                   java.io.IOException
        Configures the default SSL context to use a merged view of the system key store and a custom key store.
        Parameters:
        keyStoreStream - A byte stream containing the custom key store.
        passphrase - The passphrase the stream is encrypted with.
        Throws:
        java.security.GeneralSecurityException
        java.io.IOException

      • mergeWithSystem

        public static void mergeWithSystem(java.io.File keyStoreFile,
                                   char[] passphrase)
                            throws java.security.GeneralSecurityException,
                                   java.io.IOException
        Configures the default SSL context to use a merged view of the system key store and a custom key store.
        Parameters:
        keyStoreFile - The file containing the custom key store.
        passphrase - The passphrase the stream is encrypted with.
        Throws:
        java.security.GeneralSecurityException
        java.io.IOException

      • buildMergedWithSystem

        public static javax.net.ssl.SSLContext buildMergedWithSystem(java.security.KeyStore keyStore)
                                                      throws java.security.GeneralSecurityException
        Generates an SSL context that uses a merged view of the system key store and a custom key store.
        Parameters:
        keyStore - The custom key store.
        Returns:
        The SSL context
        Throws:
        java.security.GeneralSecurityException

      • getSystemKeyManager

        public static javax.net.ssl.X509KeyManager getSystemKeyManager(java.lang.String algorithm,
                                                               java.security.KeyStore keystore,
                                                               char[] password)
                                                        throws java.security.GeneralSecurityException
        Throws:
        java.security.GeneralSecurityException

      • getSystemTrustManager

        public static javax.net.ssl.X509TrustManager getSystemTrustManager(java.lang.String algorithm,
                                                                   java.security.KeyStore keystore)
                                                            throws java.security.GeneralSecurityException
        Throws:
        java.security.GeneralSecurityException
